underlying_goal: Build and iteratively improve a GitLab pipeline status checking tool with URL parsing, job log analysis, and knowledge base-driven root cause analysis
friction_detail: Initial knowledge base confidence scoring logic was too naive (0% and low matches for clearly relevant failures), requiring rework of the analysis approach from 'does KB explain the error' to 'relevance scoring'.
brief_summary: User iteratively built a GitLab pipeline status tool adding direct URL input, failed job log fetching with root cause analysis, and knowledge base relevance scoring — all features were successfully implemented and tested.
